# s02 sample interactions

# Run:
#   ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=... go run . -v "show me the first 30 lines of agents/s02-tool-registry/main.go"
#
# Expected shape (LLMs aren't deterministic — exact text varies):

[registry] 2 tools: [bash read_file] (gen=2)
[turn 0] assistant: I'll read the file.
[turn 0] -> read_file map[path:agents/s02-tool-registry/main.go]
[turn 0] <- package main  import (  "context"  "flag" ...
[turn 1] assistant: Here are the first 30 lines of main.go: ...
<file content summary>


# Run:
#   ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=... go run . -v "what's today's date in ISO 8601 format?"
#
# Expected shape:

[registry] 2 tools: [bash read_file] (gen=2)
[turn 0] assistant: I'll check the current date with bash.
[turn 0] -> bash map[command:date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ]
[turn 0] <- 2026-05-09T05:21:33Z
[turn 1] assistant: Today is 2026-05-09 (UTC).
2026-05-09 (UTC).
